name: Mina
description:
One of the captains of the Alola region, she travels around at her own pace, searching for subjects for her artwork that both people and Pokémon will enjoy.

Full name: Mina Pena

Age: 19

Height: 174 cm

Hometown: Seafolk Village, Poni Island, Alola region

Hobbies: Painting pictures, painting on her own body

Friends: Ilima

Battle Gimmicks: Z-Moves
creator: Ice Pokémon Trainer
